title: Emotional Hostages (song)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
"'''Emotional Hostages'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] by [[Annadale Fayde]] that was released on an [[Emotional Hostages|album of the same name]], and on a later album entitled ''[[Darkness on the Land]]''. It was given a Scarlet rating by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-05-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''
